mapper.select:
SELECT A.rqst_no , A.title , A.rqst_id , A.ins_dt , A.upt_dt , A.views , A.group_no , A.parent_no , A.depth , A.order_no , A.secret , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment WHERE ref_id = A.rqst_no AND board_type = 'YOUTH') AS commentCount FROM board A WHERE A.board_type = 'YOUTH' AND A.is_deleted = FALSE
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.rqst_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY A.group_no DESC, A.order_no ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board A WHERE A.board_type = 'YOUTH' AND A.is_deleted = FALSE
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.rqst_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT A.rqst_no AS rqstNo , A.title , A.cont , A.rqst_id , A.ins_dt , A.upt_dt , A.views , A.group_no , A.parent_no , A.depth , A.order_no , A.secret , A.password FROM board A WHERE A.rqst_no = #{rqstNo} AND A.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (rqst_no, title, cont, rqst_id, ins_dt, upt_dt, views, group_no, parent_no, depth, order_no, secret, password, board_type) VALUES (#{rqstNo}, #{title}, #{cont}, #{rqstId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0, #{groupNo}, #{parentNo}, #{depth}, #{orderNo}, #{secret}, #{password}, 'YOUTH')
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comment SET is_deleted = TRUE WHERE ref_id = #{boardNo} AND board_type = 'YOUTH'
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, board_type, ref_id, rqst_id, cont, ins_dt, upt_dt, likes, dislikes FROM board_comment WHERE ref_id = #{boardNo} AND board_type = 'YOUTH' AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY ins_dt ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment (board_type, ref_id, rqst_id, cont, ins_dt) VALUES ('YOUTH', #{refId}, #{rqstId}, #{cont}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comment SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE board_comment SET likes = likes - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE board_comment SET dislikes = dislikes + 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE board_comment SET dislikes = dislikes - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
